metadata.task: Apply a force of 20 N to the first sphere and make it collide with the second sphere. After the collision, apply torque to both spheres and calculate the new angular momentum and torque after 2 seconds.

expected_behavior: The LLM should detect the collision between the two spheres and calculate the torque and angular momentum on both spheres after the impact.
reasoning: After the collision, the torque applied to each sphere will result in angular momentum. These values should be calculated after 2 seconds of simulation.
